calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GRAVITY4, INC. MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT - Duplicate entry.

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Malcolm Leader-Picone, Esq. (510-444-244 x24) of Leader-Picone & Young LLP for Plaintiff/opposing party .
Adrian Driscoll, Esq. (415-788-1900) of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeny for Defendant/Moving party GRAVITY4, INC.

RULING - ARGUED. Plaintiff argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GRAVITY4, INC's. Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment.

Defendant Gravity4, Inc.'s motion to vacate default and default judgment is granted. Gravity4 has shown that it is entitled to the relief it seeks per CCP 473. 5 and that relief is in accord with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Plaintiff Countly, Ltd. has not shown that it would suffer legal prejudice by the granting of the motion.

Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
